title: ViolationOutput
description: Output schema for the Defensor Violation Agent.

violations.description: List of identified or possible legal violations.

article.description: Citation in the form 'Ley 29414, Art. 15' or 'Ley 29414, Art. 15.3'.

article_text_excerpt.description: A brief direct quote or paraphrase from the cited article, in Spanish.

violation_type.description: 'confirmada' when the facts clearly support the violation; 'posible' when uncertain; 'no_aplica' when explicitly ruling out a violation.

explanation.description: Plain-language explanation for the patient (in Spanish) of what right was violated and how.

severity.description: 'alta' for fundamental access denials; 'media' for procedural violations; 'baja' for informational or minor violations.

summary.description: 1–2 sentences in plain Spanish summarizing the violations found, addressed to the patient.

recommended_channel.description: The most appropriate complaint channel given the network and violation type.

complaint_viable.description: True if there is sufficient basis to file a formal complaint.

confidence.description: The agent's confidence in this analysis, accounting for document quality and factual clarity.
